summary: Add the smallest verifiable Radar Task management API slice on top of the Prisma schema.
acceptance_criteria: Radar Task list/create/read/update/delete operations are available through Next.js route handlers or a server-only helper layer backed by Prisma.
Inputs are validated with Zod and reuse or extend the existing radar task schemas without weakening existing validation.
The implementation returns structured JSON errors for invalid input, missing records, and unexpected failures without leaking secrets.
The API slice preserves the current MVP single-admin assumption and does not implement authentication or sessions in this task.
No UI CRUD, admin gate, scan orchestration, SERP provider, LLM integration, or deployment work is implemented.
README documents the local API slice and the commands needed to validate it if new scripts are added.
notes: Role resolver selected implementation_engineer because this is server/API logic on top of existing persistence.
systems_architect is required because route contracts and persistence boundaries are introduced.
qa_reviewer remains the independent final acceptance reviewer.
Keep this to the smallest API/management slice; full admin protection and UI CRUD belong to a later task.
non_goals: No login page or session cookie.
No dashboard, form, or UI CRUD pages.
No scan orchestration or provider integration.
No LLM calls or AI agents.
No Prisma schema migration or mock-data edits.
No paid service, deployment, or external database setup.
